title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots
description: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of validated library entity types while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate allocation, initialization, validation, and alternate construction.
Use dataclasses and immutable value objects where generated behavior matches the domain.
Preserve invariants across every construction and mutation path.
